top_signals.title: CSIS' Cahill on US-Iran Deal Impact on Energy
top_signals.summary: Ben Cahill, non-resident senior associate for the Energy Security and Climate Change Program at CSIS, says even though the US and Iran were able to come to an agreement to halt the ongoing war and reopen the strait of Hormuz, energy markets "are not quite out of the woods yet", and there is still room for prices to run up even after the MOU is signed. He speaks with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud Watts on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stock Market Moves On From SpaceX to Focus on Iran Deal, Fed
top_signals.summary: After SpaceX and its bankers pulled off the largest-ever IPO without a hitch last week, investors are returning their focus back to Earth.

top_signals.title: 'Proud Moment for Pakistan': Finance Minister on US-Iran Agreement
top_signals.summary: Pakistani Finance Minister Muhammad Aurangzeb speaks with Bloomberg Television about the "critical role" his country has played in facilitating an interim agreement between the US and Iran. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: US strike kills leader of Venezuela’s Tren de Aragua gang, White House says
top_signals.summary: Venezuela’s information ministry said that during the operation there were clashes with members of criminal groups, in which the leader was neutralized.

top_signals.title: Pakistan Says It's in 'Very Good Place on Fiscal Side'
top_signals.summary: Pakistan Finance Minister Muhammad Aurangzeb believes the country is in a 'very good place on the fiscal side'. He speaks with Paul Allen on "Insight with Haslinda Amin." (Source: Bloomberg)
